description:
Desktop Companion for Hermes Agent

Hermes Desktop is a native desktop app for installing, configuring, and chatting with Hermes Agent — a self-improving AI assistant with tool use, multi-platform messaging, and a closed learning loop.
Instead of managing the CLI by hand, the app walks through install, provider setup, and day-to-day usage in one place. It uses the official Hermes install script, stores Hermes in ~/.hermes, and gives you a GUI for chat, sessions, profiles, memory, skills, tools, scheduling, messaging gateways, and more.
What's Changed
- fix(stream): resolve message text truncation in streaming responses by @SpiritLiberation in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/780
- fix(config-health): audit API_SERVER_KEY for non-ASCII characters by @AmirF194 in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/812
- fix(chat): drop backend commands that collide with a desktop alias by @AmirF194 in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/818
- fix:stabilize box-drawing code block rendering by @LacBang in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/739
- fix(chat): render image lightbox via portal so paint containment can't clip it by @laofoot in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/807
- fix(chat): ensure context gauge shows estimate when provider omits usage by @Ulaganathan-K-B in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/789
- SSH mode: reliable connection, unified dashboard, and profile-aware chat by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/786
- fix(profiles): persist active_profile directly when the local CLI can't by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/823
- Fix DashScope provider mapping by @lucyonegit in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/825
- fix(skills): route remote (HTTP) mode to the dashboard skills API by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/824
- Login with hermes one by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/801
- Sync Console by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/835
- feat(chat): chrome-style keyboard shortcuts for conversation tabs by @jaeeyoungkim in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/832
- fix(discover): use GitHub token auth for tree fetch + extend cache TTL by @jamesng16 in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/833
- Refactor profile names to stable ids by @lucyonegit in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/829
- Office interiors: enterable buildings, interactive bank tellers, and account-switch safety by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/843
- Sync Agents to Console by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/837
- Provider-owned models: shared model definitions, remove Models tab, redesigned model picker by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/848
- Custom provider manager + chat avatar + beta release channel by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/849
- feat: support OAuth-authenticated remote dashboards by @itsJai42 in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/853
- feat: add authenticated remote management client by @itsJai42 in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/855
- Office re-layout + Bank Teller / ATM wallet modal by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/859
- Enhancement: UI Polish by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/860
- Office World Actions: chat-commanded errands in the 3D world by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/864
- Provider reconfig: agent-config sync, Hermes One auto-provisioning, provider UI redesign & chat stream fixes by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/862
- Modern loaders: replace spinners with thinking-orbs by @fathah in https://github.com/fathah/hermes-desktop/pull/868
